name: Saline Nasal Spray
note: Isotonic or hypertonic saline; safe for all ages including infants and pregnancy; moisturizes and clears nasal passages

name: Nasya Oil
note: Ayurvedic sesame or herbal oil applied in nostrils; lubricates and protects nasal passages; morning practice

name: Neti Pot
note: Nasal irrigation device; use sterile or distilled water only; clears allergens, mucus, and environmental irritants

name: Flonase
note: OTC intranasal corticosteroid; first-line for seasonal and perennial allergic rhinitis; 1-2 weeks to full effect

name: Budesonide Nasal Spray OTC
note: OTC intranasal corticosteroid; safe in pregnancy; 32-64mcg per nostril; controls nasal allergy symptoms

name: Olopatadine Nasal Spray
note: Prescription antihistamine nasal spray; fast-acting allergic rhinitis relief; available as Patanase

name: Xlear Nasal Spray
note: Xylitol + saline; inhibits bacterial adhesion in nasal passages; non-medicated; safe for daily use

name: Sinupret
note: Combination herbal extract for sinusitis; European herbal tradition; secretolytic and mucolytic effects

name: Bioidentical Progesterone Cream
note: OTC topical progesterone; apply to thin-skinned areas; low but measurable serum levels; hormonal support

name: Estradiol Topical Compounded
note: Compounded topical estradiol; prescription only; customized dosing for HRT; rotate application sites

name: Magnesium Oil Spray
note: Magnesium chloride in water; applied topically; bypasses GI absorption; muscle and sleep support

name: Castor Oil Pack
note: Organic castor oil applied to skin covered with wool flannel or pack; liver, lymphatic, and anti-inflammatory support

name: Lavender Essential Oil
note: Topical and aromatic use; stress, sleep, and skin support; dilute in carrier oil for topical application

name: Frankincense Essential Oil
note: Boswellic compounds; anti-inflammatory, immune, and cellular support; topical and aromatic use

name: Peppermint Essential Oil
note: Topical for headache, muscle pain, and digestion; aromatic for focus; dilute well; avoid near infants

name: Arnica Gel
note: Homeopathic topical for bruising, swelling, and muscle soreness; apply to unbroken skin

name: CBD Topical
note: Topical cannabidiol for localized pain and inflammation; minimal systemic absorption; no psychoactive effect

name: DMSO Gel
note: Penetrating solvent; carries other compounds into skin; used for pain and joint support; garlic breath side effect

name: Glutathione Cream
note: Topical antioxidant; skin lightening and anti-aging interest; transdermal absorption debated

name: Quercetin Cream
note: Anti-inflammatory flavonoid in topical form; used for skin inflammation and mast cell-related skin reactions

name: Non-Toxic Deodorant
note: Aluminum-free formulations; magnesium, baking soda, or mineral-based; avoid conventional antiperspirants

name: Fluoride-Free Toothpaste
note: Nano-hydroxyapatite alternatives for remineralization; brands like Risewell, Bite, Davids popular

name: Tongue Scraper
note: Removes tongue coating and bacteria; Ayurvedic practice; reduces bad breath; copper or stainless steel

name: Water Flosser
note: Pressurized water flossing; superior plaque removal for most people; orthodontic and periodontal maintenance

name: Non-Toxic Sunscreen
note: Zinc oxide or titanium dioxide based; no oxybenzone or chemical UV filters; EWG-rated brands preferred

name: Mineral Sunscreen
note: Physical UV blockers only; tinted versions reduce white cast; Supergoop Unseen, ISDIN, Beautycounter popular

name: Non-Toxic Shampoo
note: Free of sulfates, parabens, and synthetic fragrance; EWG-verified or MADE SAFE certified options

name: Non-Toxic Conditioner
note: Free of parabens, phthalates, and synthetic fragrance; nourishes without endocrine-disrupting ingredients

name: Fragrance-Free Laundry Detergent
note: Free of synthetic fragrance; important for sensitive skin, hormone support, and respiratory health

name: Wool Dryer Balls
note: Replaces synthetic dryer sheets; reduces static naturally; add lavender oil for fragrance if desired

name: Red Light Therapy Panel
note: 660nm (red) and 850nm (NIR) device; skin, joint, and mitochondrial benefits; 10-20 min daily sessions

name: PEMF Mat
note: Full-body PEMF mat; bone healing, pain, and sleep improvement; Flexpulse, Healthyline, and MiraMate models

name: Infrared Sauna Blanket
note: Portable far-infrared sauna blanket; sweating, recovery, and circulation; convenient home detox option

name: Portable Home Sauna
note: Single-person infrared sauna for home use; daily sweating protocol; detox and cardiovascular conditioning

name: Cold Plunge Tub
note: Home cold plunge setup; Plunge, Monk, or Ice Barrel brands; 3-5 min at 50-59°F for recovery and mood

name: Grounding Mat
note: Conductive mat connected to earth ground via outlet; used while sleeping or working; reduces static charge

name: TENS Unit
note: Electrical pain relief device; OTC units for muscle pain, period cramps, and post-surgical recovery

name: Massage Gun
note: Percussive therapy device; myofascial release and muscle recovery; use on soft tissue only, avoid joints

name: Foam Roller
note: Self-myofascial release tool; thoracic mobility, IT band, and calf; use body weight; 30-90 sec per area

name: Lacrosse Ball
note: Small dense ball for targeted trigger point and myofascial release; glutes, pecs, plantar fascia

name: Acupressure Mat
note: Plastic spike mat for back; lying on it releases endorphins and promotes relaxation; 15-20 min sessions

name: Himalayan Salt Lamp
note: Aesthetic warm light; purported negative ion benefits; evidence for air purification very limited; calming ambiance

name: HEPA Air Purifier
note: True HEPA captures 99.97% of particles >0.3 microns; essential for mold illness, allergies, and air quality

name: Air Quality Monitor
note: Monitors PM2.5, VOCs, CO2, humidity, and temperature; identifies air quality issues in home and office

name: Blue Light Glasses
note: Worn in evening to reduce blue light exposure; supports melatonin production and sleep onset; amber lens preferred

name: Prenatal Vitamin Approved
note: Key criteria: methylfolate (not folic acid), chelated minerals, DHA, iodine; Thorne Basic Prenatal recommended

name: Magnesium Glycinate Pregnancy
note: 300-400mg magnesium glycinate; safe and recommended in pregnancy; supports sleep, muscle cramps, and mood

name: DHA Prenatal Supplement
note: 200-600mg DHA; critical for fetal brain and eye development; continue through breastfeeding

name: Ginger Chews Nausea
note: Chewable ginger for pregnancy nausea; Chimes brand or Reed's ginger chews; safe alternative to medication

name: B6 and Doxylamine Nausea
note: First-line pregnancy nausea: 25mg B6 three times daily + 25mg doxylamine at bedtime; OB-recommended protocol

name: Unisom SleepTabs Pregnancy
note: Green box Unisom (doxylamine succinate — NOT the gel caps which are diphenhydramine); pregnancy nausea/sleep

name: Colace Stool Softener
note: 100mg docusate sodium; safe throughout pregnancy and postpartum; prevents straining-related complications

name: Tums Antacid Pregnancy
note: Safe antacid and calcium supplement in pregnancy; chew thoroughly; provides 200-500mg elemental calcium per tablet

name: Belly Butter Pregnancy
note: Moisturizing cream for growing belly; cocoa butter, shea, and oils; supports skin elasticity; start early

name: Belly Oil Pregnancy
note: Dry oil blend for abdominal massage; rosehip, argan, and vitamin E oils; supports skin hydration during growth

name: Hemorrhoid Cream
note: Preparation H or witch hazel cream; safe in pregnancy for hemorrhoid discomfort; apply to affected area

name: Perineal Massage Oil
note: Organic sweet almond or coconut oil; start at 34-36 weeks for perineal stretching; reduces tearing in delivery

name: Prenatal Folic Acid
note: 400-800mcg daily ideally 3 months pre-conception; neural tube defect prevention; methylfolate preferred

name: Postpartum Vitamin
note: Continued nutrition support for recovery and lactation; higher iron, DHA, and iodine needs; continue 6-12 months

name: Sitz Bath
note: Warm water soaking of perineum 15-20 min; promotes healing after vaginal birth; add Epsom salts or herbs

name: Witch Hazel Pads
note: Chilled witch hazel pads for perineal soreness and hemorrhoids; cooling and anti-inflammatory

name: Dermoplast Spray
note: Topical benzocaine anesthetic spray; perineal pain relief after vaginal delivery; blue cap is OB-approved version

name: Nipple Cream Lanolin
note: Pure lanolin; safe for baby; apply after every feeding; prevents and heals sore and cracked nipples

name: Breast Milk Storage Bags
note: BPA-free food-grade bags; pre-sterilized; lie flat to freeze for space efficiency; date and label every bag

name: Nursing Pads
note: Absorbs breast milk leakage; disposable or reusable bamboo/cotton; change frequently to prevent mastitis

name: Nipple Shield
note: Thin silicone shield worn during nursing; helps with flat nipples, latch issues, and nipple pain; use temporarily

name: Postpartum Recovery Belt
note: Abdominal compression post-birth; supports healing, reduces swelling, and provides comfort; used 6-8 weeks

name: Magnesium Glycinate Postpartum
note: 300-400mg at bedtime; supports sleep quality, mood, and postpartum anxiety; safe during breastfeeding

name: Placenta Encapsulation
note: Dehydrated and encapsulated placenta; reported benefits for energy, milk supply, and mood; evidence limited

name: Omega-3 Postpartum
note: Continue through breastfeeding; DHA critical for infant brain development in breast milk; 600mg+ DHA recommended

name: Lactation Support Supplement
note: Fenugreek, blessed thistle, and moringa blends; anecdotal milk supply support; evidence mixed but widely used

name: Non-Toxic Body Lotion
note: Free of parabens, phthalates, synthetic fragrance, and PEGs; shea butter or ceramide-based options

name: Non-Toxic Dry Shampoo
note: Free of aerosol propellants and synthetic fragrance; starch-based powder formulas; arrowroot alternatives

name: Beeswax Lip Balm
note: Natural wax base without petroleum; raw shea and beeswax versions free of synthetic preservatives

name: Non-Toxic Makeup
note: Free of heavy metals, parabens, synthetic fragrance, and acrylates; EWG Verified or MADE SAFE certified

name: Non-Toxic Perfume
note: Made with essential oils and plant-based aroma compounds; no synthetic fragrance chemicals or phthalates

name: Microbiome-Friendly Lubricant
note: Isotonic, pH-matched formulas safe for vaginal microbiome; avoid glycerin, parabens, and petroleum

name: Feminine Wash
note: pH-balanced gentle external wash; no fragrance or soap inside vagina; external vulvar hygiene only

name: Organic Cotton Tampons
note: Organic cotton; free of chlorine bleaching, dioxin, and synthetic fragrance; Cora, Lola, TUSHY brands

name: Menstrual Cup
note: Medical-grade silicone reusable cup; zero waste; 10-12 hour wear; no chemicals; boil to sterilize between cycles

name: Period Underwear
note: Absorbent reusable underwear; multiple absorption levels; PFAS-free options important (Thinx controversy 2023)

name: Non-Toxic Cleaning Products
note: Free of chlorine, ammonia, and synthetic fragrance; plant-based surfactants; reduces indoor air quality burden

name: Glass Storage Containers
note: Replaces plastic; eliminates BPA and phthalate leaching especially when heating food; oven-safe options

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
note: Replaces plastic bottles; no BPA, PFAS, or plastic off-gassing; keeps beverages at temperature

name: Cast Iron Cookware
note: Non-toxic cooking surface; no PFAS coating; adds dietary iron; season regularly; avoid acidic foods long-term

name: Stainless Steel Cookware
note: Safe cooking surface; no PFAS; nickel may leach into acidic foods for nickel-sensitive individuals

name: Water Filter Pitcher
note: Removes chlorine, fluoride, heavy metals, and microplastics; Clearly Filtered and Berkey highest performance

name: Reverse Osmosis Filter
note: Removes 95-99% of contaminants including fluoride; add minerals back with drops or remineralization filter

name: Shower Filter
note: Reduces chlorine and chloramines absorbed through skin and inhaled during showering; important for thyroid health

name: Organic Bedding
note: GOTS certified organic cotton; reduces pesticide and chemical off-gassing; important given 8 hours/night exposure

name: Low-EMF Sleep Environment
note: Airplane mode on phone, no WiFi router in bedroom, no smart devices sleeping nearby; precautionary approach

name: Sleep Mask
note: Blocks ambient light for deeper sleep; contoured silicone or silk masks most comfortable

name: Earplugs Sleep
note: Reduces noise disturbance; foam or wax earplugs; Loop and Mack's brands comfortable for side sleepers

name: Blackout Curtains
note: Complete light blocking for sleep; supports melatonin production; especially important for shift workers

name: White Noise Machine
note: Masks environmental noise; consistent background sound improves sleep continuity; also useful for babies

name: Weighted Blanket
note: 10-15% body weight; deep pressure stimulation promotes relaxation; anxiety, insomnia, and sensory processing

name: Mouth Tape
note: Encourages nasal breathing during sleep; reduces snoring, supports nitric oxide production; 3M micropore or Somnifix

name: Nasal Dilator Strips
note: Mechanical nasal dilator; improves nasal airflow for sleep and exercise; non-medicated; safe for all ages

name: Mandibular Advancement Device
note: OTC or custom fitted device positioning jaw forward; reduces snoring and mild sleep apnea

name: Infrared Thermometer
note: Quick non-contact temperature reading; useful for illness monitoring and basal body temperature tracking

name: Pulse Oximeter
note: Non-invasive blood oxygen and pulse rate monitor; useful during illness, at altitude, and for sleep apnea monitoring

name: Blood Glucose Meter
note: Standard blood glucose monitoring; useful without CGM; calibrate against known standards

name: Electrolyte Strips Test
note: Ketone or multi-analyte urine test strips; monitor ketosis, hydration, and basic urinalysis markers

name: Posture Corrector
note: Postural feedback brace; use short-term to retrain awareness; combine with strengthening exercises

name: Ergonomic Desk Setup
note: Monitor at eye level, wrists neutral, feet flat; reduces musculoskeletal strain from prolonged sitting/typing

name: Saline Eye Drops
note: Sterile saline for eye irrigation and lubrication; remove contacts before use; preserve-free single-dose preferred

name: Lid Scrub Pads
note: Pre-moistened pads for eyelid hygiene; blepharitis, meibomian gland dysfunction, and eye health maintenance

name: Warm Compresses Eye
note: Warm moist compress 10-15 min; softens meibomian gland secretions; dry eye and blepharitis treatment

name: Neti Pot Saline Packets
note: Isotonic buffered saline packets for nasal rinsing; pH-balanced to prevent burning; one packet per rinse

name: Activated Charcoal Teeth Powder
note: Occasional use only; abrasive — limit to 1-2x/week maximum; may stain restorations; not for daily use

name: Coconut Oil Pulling
note: 1-2 tbsp coconut oil swished 15-20 min before eating; Ayurvedic oral microbiome support and detox practice
